{{Quote|Now, at long last, the fierce fuzzy fighters from the smash movie 'The Return of the Jedi,' '''the Ewoks''', have their very own comic series!|''Marvel Age'' 25|<ref name="Marvel Age 25" />}}
'''''Star Wars: Ewoks''''' was a fourteen-issue series of comics published by [[Star Comics]], an imprint of [[Marvel Comics]], from [[1985]] to [[1987]]. The series was a tie-in to [[Ewoks (television series)|the animated series]] and was aimed at a young audience. The series' first four issues were released before the television show premiered.

A [[Ewoks (1985) 15|fifteenth issue]] of the series was solicited but never published.<ref name="Marvel Age">''Marvel Age 53''</ref>  [[Ewoks Annual|An annual]] published in the UK in [[1988]] features stories reprinted from this series plus some original short stories.<ref name="Annuals">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-in-the-uk-star-wars-comic-book-annuals|text=''Star Wars'' in the UK: ''Star Wars'' Comic Book Annuals}}</ref>
